title: Orbital Strike Cannon V2
description: This is the V2 of my orbital strike cannon. As my old plugin/mod got deleted/unlisted off of modrinth soo im fixing my old errors and uploading the new fixed version.
body:
This is the new release of my orbital strike cannon mod/plugin i hope this one doesnt get taken down.

**Features**
Nuke/Stab/Wolf/Stasis

Nuke 10 rings

Stab -63 to world height

Wolf 100 wolfs

Stasis input cords to teleport to

**Usage**
/orbitalrod <payload>
/orbitalstrike <payload> <x> <z>

**IMPORTANT Note:**
Paper: Set max-tnt-per-tick: 1000000 in spigot.yml
